title: stipa pennata var. appendiculata
intro: Stipa pennata var. appendiculata, also known as the Feather Reed Grass, is a variety of the Stipa pennata species, a type of ornamental grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Stipa pennata var. appendiculata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy.
